utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides both with names and explicit monthly costs (€45 and €30) plus brief coverage details. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan includes home_contents (€25/month) and photography_equipment (€30/month) with coverage notes. Home/contents is covered with cost; adding equipment is fine. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan includes international_travel with product name, €50/month, and destinations covered. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists professional_liability (€35/month) and adventure_activities included at no separate cost. Costs are specified or explicitly none. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly total (€190), annual (€2,280), comparison, effective date, compliance note, and policy numbers. Fully specified.
Therefore, 5/5 items are successfully included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We must match each item in the final plan to a name appearing in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: SecureLife Standard Physical Health (closest in ratings is 'SecureLife Basic Plan' under physical health), SecureLife Mental Health Standard (closest is 'SecureLife Basic Plan' under mental health), BudgetProtect Essentials for home contents (no matching item in ratings), Photography Equipment Protection (no matching item), InsurePlus Standard Travel Insurance (matches 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under travel insurance), Professional Liability Insurance (no matching item), and an 'adventure activities' note (not a standalone rated item). Therefore, only three items have direct counterparts: SecureLife Basic Plan (physical), SecureLife Basic Plan (mental), and InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel). Their ratings are 4, 8, and 10 respectively.
